text:
There once stood a beautiful oak tree near a quiet stream.

Every autumn leaves would swirl around it and rustle softly.

A strange girl would visit often. She would listen and watch.

Stars would twinkle through the canopy. Owls would hoot softly.

One night she fell asleep amongst the rustles.

A gentle owl slipped down through her hair.

Suddenly waking with dew on her cheek.

She looked up. The owl glided across.

It whispered secrets.

So she sang.

A melody of dreams.

The tree listened.

From that day forth, their song.

They sang together.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
